nodes.summary: Dessonornis（Dessonornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Archer's ground robin、Olive-flanked ground robin、Cape robin-chat等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Archer's ground robin
nodes.summary: Archer's ground robin or Archer's robin-chat, (Dessonornis archeri) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found in the Albertine Rift montane forests. The bird's common name commemorates the British explorer and colonial official Sir Geoffrey Francis Archer. References

nodes.name: Albertine Rift montane forests
nodes.summary: Albertine Rift montane forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联44种鸟类，包括Barred long-tailed cuckoo、白枕鸽、Albertine owlet等44种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。
